255 HEALED_STG_4_PRSR_ULCRS_NUM HEALED_STG_4_PRSR_ULCRS_NUM M0900D Healed Stage 4 Pressure Ulcers Number CHAR 1 The number of Stage 4 pressure ulcers that were: (a) present on Admission; and (b) have completely closed (resurfaced with epithelium) upon Discharge. If there are no healed pressure ulcers noted at a given stage, enter 0.
